scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => { try { fs.rmSync(f, { force: true }); } catch {} }); const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server --filter @workspace/mobile run typecheck && node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module --eval "import('./lib/db/src/migrate.ts').then(m => m.runMigrations()).then(() => { console.log('migrations OK'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
